'''New Republic Intelligence Operations Command''', also known as the '''Operations Ministry''' or simply '''Operations''',<ref name="WBC">[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']]</ref> was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] intelligence organization, possibly the command staff of the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]]. [[Brigadier]] [[Colin Darkmere]] was a ranking member during [[Operation Shadow Hand]].
